reviews.review_description: I bought it online with browser ,later went to install on my S8 but not finding the game at all.

developer_response.body: Hi, at this stage we have only submitted the game to be available on the GO and S10 and above due to performance requirements. If you try to purchase through your S8 you would not be able to however as you purchased online it could not tell what device you have. This process is completely run by Oculus and out of the developers control.  We suggest contacting Oculus through this link, requesting a refund and let them know how you purchased. https://tickets.oculusvr.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: first golf course for the go, game is great, needs a few twinks, but over all great game for the money,developers doing a good job on upgrades, putting grid,power meter for the practice swing,less water, would be nice, thank you again from all us golfers, keep up the good work, Thank you for the putting grid, works great, Have been enjoying the game every day, I'm Retired so this is great ! I feel like I'm out their you did a great job, the trees could be better though, For $4.99 the best buy on the Go. Thanks again How do you change from meters to yards?

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for letting us know your still enjoying it. no option to change from meters to yards yet but we will put it on the list. [Edit Update 9 is now out which includes Yards!]

reviews.review_description: No longer works

developer_response.body: Hi, it has been recently reported that a large number of games on the GO that use one of Meta's services called "entitlement" to no longer work. As the device is no longer officially supported, we are not sure if Meta will fix the issue. We have however been able to create a version of our other game  "Exvrience Golf Club" that does not require "entitlement" to work. If you would like access to this, please email service@exvrience.com.

reviews.review_title: 1st good Golf Game for the Go!
reviews.review_description: I just bought this from the Oculus Store yesterday and I am really enjoying it.  You def need to spend some time on the practise green and driving range in order to get used to the controls.  I really like how you can rotate your view/aim with the left/right touchpad.  I wish you could adjust the distance from the ball as well, say with the up/down touchpad.  I find that the stock ball placement is a little too close for me so I feel a little cramped.   Also, I think you need to increase the power more.  Even with you latest update I cannot generate much more than 80% power.  Overall I think this is a great golf game for the Go and given a few more updates will get even better (I hope).

developer_response.body: Hi Tom, glad your enjoying the game. up/down touchpad is a great idea so will look into that. Will also look into slightly more power for some clubs in the next update. Again we will continue to update based on feedback so really appreciate it. [Edit - Update 2 is now out with slightly more power for each of the clubs and better consistency!] [Edit - Update 3 is out with an option to boost swing sensitivity so you don't have to swing as hard]

reviews.review_description: The putting is the only thing that seems a bit off. The rest of the game might not be like swinging a real golf club but as far as video games are concerned I’m not sure where you’ll find better. It’s a lot of fun!

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for letting us know your enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: Fun to play.  Control 8s nice. This game is relax8ng.

developer_response.body: Hi, great your enjoying the game - thanks for letting us know.

reviews.review_description:
So I’ll start off by saying I love this game. But it can be extremely frustrating at times. For me the issue is the in consistency with power. I’ve tested it out with several identical swings with a driver, the first was 56% the second 80% the third 100%...you get the idea. I understand wanting to make the result of the swing as accurate as possible but you have to remember we don’t have the same kind of control over the club in VR as we do in real life. 

On a good note, I do like the new drive boost and the new grid on the green. 

To sum up, this game needs work, but they constantly update and I’m sure it will be greatly improved very soon. So if you are on the fence about buying it, I would recommend you buy!

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for letting us know you love the game! Update 7 has just been released with improved swing consistency. We have rewritten the code specifically taking measurements from the Oculus controller. In testing on the driving range we were able to hit the truck every time with the same swing. Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_description: Ok funny thing is I never do this. But I have to write y'all about this game. Y'all could literally have the best game on the go or the quest for that matter if y'all could just fix the thing. So I'm planning just now git a great round going and the game for no reason at all just starts slowing up. All of my readings are off and I can't swing the club. Now because there is no save feature I lose this round. Wth?!?!?!?!?! Can y'all not charge a little for the game and make it better. Different courses, the opportunity to buy better clubs, and free up the greens. Jesus it's like putting through maple syrup and it didn't used to be like that. Anyway love the game please fix.

developer_response.body: Hi, glad you are enjoying the game and thanks for the feedback. We have not received reports of issues from other users so would suggest rebooting your headset, letting it cool down and ensure you have full battery especially in the controller which can affect the swing if low.

reviews.review_description: Playing daily and getting better,still getting used to feel for putting but it does simulate my real game, wish it showed my high scores and stats ,like birdies ,eagles and such, adding new courses would be another good upgrade.

reviews.review_title: Good luck on getting it to download
reviews.review_description: This game is way too quirky to download.  The download, over 400 MB, will stop downloading if you blink or your dog farts.  I am two hours into downloading, and have had to restart 7 times.  Let me know if you have the secret ninja code to get this to download.  Good luck to you trying to get this on your Oculus Go.

developer_response.body: Hi, we just tested the download and it is working fine. You could try restarting your Oculus GO headset or contacting Oculus directly who may able to assist your problem.

reviews.review_description: Put down the miniature golf clubs and step over to ExVERience Golf. Finally there is a VR game for the sports simulation enthusiast. Practice on a driving range and putting green before hitting up the challenging 18 holes filled with traps, water and colorful environments. Duffers can also get the lay of the course by doing a fly-over in “Helicopter” mode, allow the computer to choose clubs based on distance and lie, or for more excitement enter Pro mode for wind, swing power, and club angle variables. At this point the physics are a still a bit wonky and a few minor frustrations exist, but the developers seem dedicated to making changes and improvements based on customer feedback. Though not as deep as titles in the Tiger Woods or Hot Shots Golf series, there is more than enough fun here to immerse a player in a relaxing round of 18 holes or making satisfying drives on the range.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for the great feedback and glad you are enjoying the game. Yes currently working on a putting grid, concede hole and tweaking the swing power/distance settings. We should have an update out very soon. [Edit - Update is now out with improved consistency!]

reviews.review_description: No matter what I do I can't swing fast enough even with the "swing booster". I can barely get above 50%. Hurt my shoulder and almost knocked my headset off trying.

developer_response.body:
Edit - 21-4-2020 - Update is now available on the store including 5% increase in power and improved club stance.

Hi. Please check the batteries in the controller as low batteries will have an affect on the swing detection. Also ensure a full swing through just like in real golf and facing the hole with your body on follow through. You can also try flicking the controller on the way through to see if that will assist. There are some incredible scores on the leaderboard below par so keep practising!

reviews.review_description: This is one of those must have games for the Go , even if you are not a huge golf fan. It's challenging but engaging and enough to keep you coming back to improve your score. Finding it hard to get 100% power in the swing without swinging really fast but see others have had success in flicking the wrist so will try that. Finding it hard to control power in putting too, probably just me but a power meter before you hit would be great, maybe hold trigger to set power then release. But great game and recommended.

developer_response.body: Hey,  glad your enjoying the game. In the latest version, there is a boost feature in the options which will increase the swing sensitivity by 20% meaning you don't have to swing as hard so you could try that. Also when putting, doing a practice swing without holding the trigger will show your power.

reviews.review_description: I need to reset the remote after every second sho to straighten the club back to normal, It doesn’t pick up some shots for some reason and if you swing a full swing it will just tap the ball at the top of the swing for no reason at all. Other than that it’s a good game. Once I get the hang of driving the ball far it should be a bit more fun.

Well done guys! I’ve waiting for this kind of sim and so far I love it! I even take the helicopter flight of the hole just for fun. Awesome. More courses please. 

Also, could we have an online multiplayer please? That would be really cool.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for letting us know your enjoying it! At the moment we are focused on getting the dynamics right like power/distance based on feedback and adding some features people have requested as well like putting grid, conceding holes.  But yes we would also like to do more courses and look at global leaderboards etc down the track

reviews.review_title: We are in the 21st Century, right?
reviews.review_description: You gotta be kidding me! I think my Amiga 500 games had better graphics. Painful, not fun.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for trying the game. It is based on a mobile platform so there are limitations in graphics capability compared to PC or video consoles. You can also check the screen shots and videos of games to see what the graphics are like prior to purchase in the future.

reviews.review_description: Much better then I Expected

developer_response.body: Hey - thanks for letting us know

reviews.review_description:
Following an initial issue with crashing at the course selection screen, which was solved by a few reinstalls and Oculus Go restarts, the game seems to be working well and is stable. Thanks to the responsive developers for helping to resolve the issue! 

The game itself, including the control scheme, is quite intuitive to play. There is a learning curve, but no more so than other control schemes I have found. The power of the shot seems to be linked to the speed at which the control is rotated, so a full swing motion is not needed to play, and as others have commented, this can be played sitting down (although swinging increases the immersion).

I quite like the graphic style. Some people have commented on the simplistic backgrounds, but I have found that the chosen style makes concentrating on the shot a lot easier, as your eyes know what to focus on rather than trying to resolve lots of unnecessary detail.

Good local multiplayer option while sharing one headset, and you can increase multiplayer engagement by casting to your smartphone so your opponent can see and comment on your shots.

One option I would like added would be to see on the ground the distance of the selected club. Judging distances can be difficult and if not heading straight for the green, so it would be helpful to have some indication of where your shot would potentially land (if hit with full power, no wind etc.), as this would help in choosing clubs and power. 

So far I am impressed with the physics engine, and all together this is a great golf simulation with the potential to play for hours with friends or on your own!

developer_response.body: [Edit, glad you resolved the issue and thanks for the great feedback and suggestions]. Hi, Sorry to hear your having a problem. We just did a fresh install on our GO headset and everything is working fine. We can also see new people have been listed on the Leaderboard since the last update so other people are also working. Suggest trying to power off/on your headset and fully charge. You can also email us at service@exvrience.com.

reviews.review_description:
As an avid golfer and lover of the game I’ve been desperately waiting for something on the GO.

I think in the future we will look back at this game and appreciate it for taking the step forward. 

Overall a fun experience!

Below are some of my thoughts and feedback. 

- The full swing doesn’t feel realistic. Not sure if I need to attach it to something but I’m much better off just using 1 hand with a “flick” which ruins the immersion 

- chipping and putting feel great and are very fun

- For putting, would be great to add more details to the grid so you can tell the break

- for shots, id love to know the elevation (example 55 yard away, 10 yard down)

- the flyover view is really fun

- please add more courses! I wish I knew how to make them because if I wish i would donate my time

- Please add online matchmaking and tournaments

Overall, $5 well spent. Please continue improving the game and adding features! I’ll keep supporting you 

Thank you.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for lettings us know you're enjoying the game. For a full swing, you could try the swing boost option to see if that gives your swing a more realistic feel. Great suggestions as well with elevation and break so we will add these to the list for future updates. [Edit: Update 10 is now out with animated putting green breaks and elevation measurement in the HUD]

reviews.review_description:
purchased on my laptop, dont see anything on my phone to download, nothing showing up, using a gear vr. 
update:  I was refunded and never got to test on my S9 maybe if they work on some samsung products they could list them and not waste peoples time. Sometimes it would show up on my Gear VR, then dissappear even within a search. Thats why I purchased it on the laptop.

developer_response.body: Hi, the app only works on some Samsung phones and the Oculus GO. As you purchased on your laptop, please contact Oculus as we have no control over the store.
